mapper.update: UPDATE product_dtl P JOIN product_mst M ON P.PRODUCT_ID = M.PRODUCT_ID SET P.SALES_PRICE = M.ORG_SALES_PRICE, P.ORG_SALES_PRICE = M.ORG_SALES_PRICE WHERE P.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND P.EXPIRATION_DATE IS NOT NULL
mapper.delete:
/* 1개월 지난 비즈톡 전송 로그 삭제 */
DELETE FROM biztalk_send_log WHERE SEND_DATE < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
